name: NI 43-101 Technical Report for the Nui Phao Project in Asia, Vietnam dated April 2002.pdf

document.title: NI 43-101 Technical Report for the Nui Phao Project in Asia, Vietnam dated April 2002.pdf
document.description: This report provides an updated mineral resource estimate for the Nui Phao Project in Vietnam, focusing on tungsten, gold, copper, bismuth, and fluorine mineralization.
